title: Fadyenia hookeri
taxonomy: Fadyenia hookeri is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asparagaceae. It is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains one species. Fadyenia hookeri is native to New South Wales and Queensland in Australia. The classification of Fadyenia hookeri places it within the subfamily Lomandroideae, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as matrushes or lomandrums. Further classification within the botanical nomenclature includes the order Asparagales.
